channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This AI tool could help curb domestic violence
item.description: A new technology can pinpoint victims of intimate partner violence four years earlier than other detection systems and with 80% accuracy.
item.dc:creator: Sibani Ram, Fast Company

item.title: This startup wants to be Shopify for indie filmmakers
item.description: A new startup is leaning on the power of recommendations to spread the word about indie films. Olyn offers a direct-to-consumer platform for film and video distribution, enabling filmmakers to retain up to 90% of their revenue.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: GTA 6 could reach PCs in early 2026 according to Corsair – but I'm already sick of waiting
item.description: We still don't know exactly when GTA 6 will make its way to console, but there are already discussions of its PC launch - and it could come sooner rather than later.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Looking for Gemini on iOS? It’s now only in Google’s dedicated Gemini app – complete with the new research mode for subscribers
item.description: Gemini is no longer available in the Google app on iOS – it's now accessed solely via the dedicate Gemini app.
item.dc:creator: john-anthony.disotto@futurenet.com (John-Anthony Disotto), TechRadar

item.title: 22 new tricks for your Google Pixel Clock app
item.description: Google’s Pixel phones are practically overflowing with useful stuff. And some of the best options of all are things you’ve probably never even noticed.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The people and AI that fuel Repsol’s digitalization
item.description: Madrid-based Repsol, a repeat finalist at the 2024 CIO 100 Awards in Spain, has been immersed for years in a process of digital transformation with the aim to become more multi-energy focused, more customer oriented, and better committed to digitalization, innovation, and talent management.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Elon Musk faces more conflict-of-interest questions after DOGE fires FDA staff reviewing Neuralink
item.description: Since the moment the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) was first proposed, Elon Musk’s critics have warned that the world’s richest man was at risk of making decisions that could be a conflict of interest, given his multiple business operations.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Safe Superintelligence Raises Over $1 Billion in Funding
item.description: Safe Superintelligence, a new artificial intelligence company founded by Ilya Sutskever, raises over $1 billion in funding with a valuation of over $30 billion.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: DOGE says it has saved government $55B so far
item.description: The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) in a post on its website says it has found $55 billion in savings through a combination of efforts, including a reduction in the federal workforce.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Ubisoft announces Rainbow Six Siege X, 'the biggest transformation' the tactical shooter has ever seen that will overhaul gameplay and graphics
item.description: Ubisoft has announced Rainbow Six Siege X, an upcoming update for the first-person tactical shooter that will see " major upgrades all around".
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Net neutrality under Trump? Not so neutral
item.description: Even before President Donald J. Trump returned to office last month, net neutrality took a punch to the jaw. On Jan. 2, the US Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit struck down the Federal Communications Commission’s (FCC) net neutrality rules. Oh well, it was nice while it lasted.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 3 key features of Postman’s AI Agent Builder
item.description: The software landscape is shifting from passive business processes to dynamic, AI-driven workflows. AI agents—systems that interact with APIs, make decisions, and execute complex tasks—are at the forefront of this transformation.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Downloads of DeepSeek's AI apps paused in South Korea over privacy concerns
item.description: DeepSeek, a Chinese artificial intelligence startup, has temporarily paused downloads of its chatbot apps in South Korea while it works with local authorities to address privacy concerns, according to South Korean officials on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mac users beware: AI-powered malware threats are on the rise
item.description: Even Apple products are vulnerable to cybercriminals, and a new report suggests the owners of Mac products will have to be more vigilant this year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Inflatable tiny house with space for six is blowing up
item.description: An inflatable six-person tiny house from a firm called 2001 looks like a space station with its inflatable dome that is transportable and eco-friendly.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Autopsy Report Reveals OpenAI Whistleblower's Death by Suicide
item.description: San Francisco County Medical Examiner's report concludes 26-year-old Suchir Balaji died from a self-inflicted gunshot wound, contradicting claims of foul play.
item.dc:creator: Jakob Rodgers, The Mercury News

item.title: TikTok returns to Apple and Google app stores in the US
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — TikTok has returned to the app stores of Apple and Google in the U.S., after President Donald Trump delayed the enforcement of a TikTok ban. TikTok, which is operated by Chinese technology firm ByteDance, was removed from Apple and Google’s app stores on Jan.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Windows 10 Insider Previews: A guide to the builds
item.description: Microsoft never sleeps. In addition to its steady releases of major and minor updates to the current version of Windows 10, the company frequently rolls out public preview builds to members of its Windows Insider Program, allowing them to test out — and even help shape — upcoming features.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Some Palo Alto Networks firewalls are spontaneously rebooting
item.description: Palo Alto Networks has acknowledged that some of its next-generation firewalls running the PAN-OS operating system are suddenly rebooting.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Scout Motors' effort to directly sell its electric SUVs where they'll make them stalls
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Legislation to let Volkswagen-backed Scout Motors sell its electric SUVs directly to people in South Carolina, where the vehicles will be built, has stalled after fierce opposition from traditional automobile dealers.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Italian government denies it spied on journalists and migrant activists using Paragon spyware
item.description: ROME (AP) — The Italian government denied Wednesday that it had spied on journalists and migrant activists using spyware but said it would cooperate with an investigation into “vulnerabilities” after at least seven Italian cellphones were apparently hacked with military-grade surveillance technology
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD and PAOLO SANTALUCIA, Associated Press, NewsNation
